common.inlineMarkdownHelp: Only inline markdown is allowed (bold, italic, links). Block elements like headings or lists are not supported here.
common.languageTooltip: Sets the content language. Helps in filtering relevant channels and grouping translations.
common.name: Name
common.title: Title

audioMixer.title: Mixer
audioMixer.tracksHint: Adjust level, pan, mute, and solo for each track

captions.generatedDescription: {addedCount} text clips were created from {sourceCount} source files
captions.modalDescription: Create text clips from transcription cache of active audio and video clips across the timeline.
captions.timelineWideDescription: The editor will scan all active audio and video media clips on non-muted, visible tracks, load their existing transcription cache, account for trims, and keep only the top visible source on overlaps.

advancedBloom.name: Свечение (Продвинутое)
advancedBloom.description: Продвинутый эффект свечения с настройкой порога и яркости

backdropBlur.name: Размытие фона
backdropBlur.description: Размытие всего, что находится позади объекта

bulgePinch.name: Искажение (Выпуклость)
bulgePinch.description: Эффект выпуклости или сжатия (эффект рыбьего глаза)

fileManager.unsupported: File System Access API is not supported in this browser

projects.autoDetectHint: Project resolution and framerate will be automatically detected from the first video added to the timeline.
projects.mobileView: Project management is not optimized for small screens. Please use a desktop browser.
projects.title: Projects

timeline.deleteTrackConfirm: This track contains clips. Delete it?
timeline.deleteTrackDescription: Track is not empty. This action cannot be undone.
timeline.fpsMismatchDesc: FPS файла {fileFps} отличается от настроек проекта {projectFps}.
timeline.speedModalDescription: Change the playback speed of the selected clip. This does not change the audio pitch.

transition.errorClipHeadHandleTooShort: Clip head handle too short (needs {needSeconds}s, has {haveSeconds}s)
transition.errorClipTailHandleTooShort: Clip tail handle too short (needs {needSeconds}s, has {haveSeconds}s)
transition.errorClipTooShort: Clip is too short for this transition (needs {need}s, has {have}s)
transition.errorNextHandleTooShort: Next clip handle too short (needs {needSeconds}s, has {haveSeconds}s)
transition.errorNoNextClip: No next clip found for transition
transition.errorNoPreviousClip: No previous clip found for transition
transition.errorPrevClipTooShort: Previous clip is too short for this transition (needs {need}s, has {have}s)
transition.errorPrevHandleTooShort: Previous clip handle too short (needs {needSeconds}s, has {haveSeconds}s)
transition.sourceAdjacent: Adjacent clip on the same track
transition.sourceBackground: Composite of all tracks below the current clip
transition.sourceTransparent: Only the current clip transparency without other sources
transition.title: Transition

welcome.selectFolder: Select a workspace folder on your computer. This folder will store all your project files, media proxies, and cache.

form.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all changes? The form will return to the last saved state.

export.doNotClose: Please do not close this window or navigate away during export.
export.keepAppOpenHint: Keep the app open and the screen awake until export finishes
export.saveLocationNote: File will be saved to the export/ folder in your project directory
export.saveWorkDescription: Save your work as a video file
export.title: Export
export.videoBitrateHelp: Approximate target bitrate. Higher values produce better quality and larger files.

fileManager.selectFolderHint: Select a folder in the sidebar to view its contents

actions.dropFilesGlobalDescription: Release files to automatically save them to the project sources folder
actions.dropToFolderHint: Drag to the File Manager on the left to upload to a specific folder
actions.dropToRootHint: Release to upload into the project root
actions.title: Actions

audio.transcriptionCachedDescription: Cached transcription was loaded from vardata.
audio.transcriptionSavedDescription: Transcription was saved to vardata cache.
audio.transcriptionSavedVideoDescription: Video audio track was transcribed and saved to vardata cache.

delete.usedWarning: This file is used in timelines:

dropOverlay.autoDescription: Drop files here or anywhere outside the folder tree. Files will be automatically sorted by type:
dropOverlay.folderDescription: Drop files on a specific folder to upload there

history.empty: No history yet. Start editing to record actions.

remote.exchangeDescription: Enter the token from the FastCat platform to access your remote files.

fileManager.unsupported: File System Access API is not supported in this browser

project.lockedDescription: This project is currently open in another tab or browser window. Concurrent editing of the same project is not supported and may lead to data loss or conflicts.
project.lockedSuggestion: You can continue in Read-Only mode to view the project, but we recommend returning to your original tab for editing.

projectSettings.deleteProjectConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the project folder and all its contents. This action cannot be undone.
projectSettings.resetConfirmDescription: This will restore all project settings to the default values from your workspace settings.
projectSettings.title: Project Settings

settings.autoCreateProxies: Automatically create proxies when adding media to the timeline
settings.browserEphemeralTmpRootPathHelp: Leave empty to use the runtime temporary location when supported. Browser workspaces always keep rebuildable cache inside the selected workspace folder.
settings.cacheLimitHelp: Total limit for cached data in this workspace
settings.clearTempWorkspaceDescription: This will remove all proxy files, thumbnails, and cache across the entire workspace. This will free up disk space, but media files will take longer to load the next time they are opened.
settings.clearTempWorkspaceHint: Free up space... Removes all temporary proxy, preview, and cache files.
settings.clearUiCacheDesc: Resets layout, panel sizes, and other UI preferences.
settings.codecUnsupportedDesc: The browser does not support hardware acceleration for this codec. Performance may be degraded.
settings.ephemeralTmpRootPathHelp: Short-lived temporary job files. Leave empty to use the system temporary directory.
settings.hotkeysCaptureHint: Waiting for key combination (Esc to cancel)
settings.hotkeysHardcodedHint: Some keys remain hardcoded in specific contexts: Escape for closing some windows, and standard file manager shortcuts (Alt, Arrows, Enter) in file explorer panels.
settings.hotkeysResetAllConfirmDesc: This will remove all custom hotkeys and restore defaults. This action cannot be undone.
settings.hotkeysResetCommandConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to reset the hotkey for this command?
settings.mouseHardcodedDblClickMonitor: Double-click in monitor: reset zoom & center
settings.mouseHardcodedDblClickTrackHeader: Double-click track header: select all clips on track
settings.mouseHardcodedLeftClick: Single left mouse click: select object
settings.mouseHardcodedLeftDrag: Left mouse button drag: move clips (box select on empty area)
settings.mouseHardcodedRazorClick: Razor Tool - Click: split clip at playhead
settings.mouseHardcodedRazorCtrlClick: Razor Tool - {modifier2} + Click: trim right part of clip
settings.mouseHardcodedRazorShiftClick: Razor Tool - {modifier1} + Click: trim left part of clip
settings.portableEphemeralTmpRootPathHelp: Portable mode stores project cache inside workspace. Leave this empty to keep short-lived job files in the system temporary directory.
settings.mediaTaskConcurrencyHelp: Limits the number of simultaneous heavy media operations (proxy generation, thumbnails, conversion).
settings.proxyCopyOpusAudio: Copy Opus audio directly without re-encoding
settings.proxyCopyOpusAudioHelp: Enabling this will skip audio transcoding if the source already has Opus audio, preserving quality and saving time.
settings.proxyInfo: Proxy files are used to improve playback performance. They are generated in MP4 format (H264 or AV1) with Opus audio codec.
settings.proxyLimitHelp: Total limit for all proxy files in this workspace
settings.proxyVideoBitrateHelp: Higher bitrate means better quality but larger file size
settings.resetAudioSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all audio settings to their default values.
settings.resetExportSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all export settings to their default values.
settings.resetGeneralSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all general settings to their default values.
settings.resetIntegrationsSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all integration settings to their default values.
settings.resetProjectDefaultSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all project default settings to their default values.
settings.resetProxySettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all proxy settings to their default values.
settings.resetStorageSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all storage limits to their default values.
settings.resetVideoSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all video performance settings to their default values.
settings.storageModeHelp: Choose between OS default folders and portable workspace-local storage.
settings.storagePathEnvironmentHint: Browser workspace mode stores projects, shared files and rebuildable cache inside the selected workspace folder. Only the workspace folder and ephemeral tmp override are configurable here.
settings.thumbnailsLimitHelp: Total limit for generated thumbnails in this workspace
settings.title: Editor settings
settings.projectAudioDeclickHint: Micro-fades (linear) applied to edges of all clips to eliminate clicks. 0 disables it.
settings.audioScrubbingHint: Play audio while scrubbing the timeline.
settings.defaultAudioFadeCurveHint: Default curve used for audio fades when you manually create a fade. (De-click always uses a short linear fade).

video.enableFfmpegHelp: Enables FFmpeg for certain video processing operations

settings.videoFrameCacheMbHelp: Maximum amount of RAM to use for decoded preview frames. Set to 0 to disable cache.
settings.workspaceSavedNote: Workspace folder saved in this browser
